name: Hush Puppies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup boiling water, more or less
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the egg, self-rising flour, cornmeal, and chopped onion until well combined.
2. Gradually add boiling water and beer, adjusting amounts as needed to achieve a thick batter.
3. Heat oil in a deep pot or skillet to 350°F (175°C).
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil using a slotted spoon.
5. Cook until golden brown, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
6. Remove the hush puppies from the oil and drain on paper towels.
